data.systemPrompt: You are Codex CLI running from the project root (one directory above /manage). Your job is to build the public website frontend and content JSONs using the stateless CMS. CRITICAL: never modify any files under /manage or /manage/store. Only work outside /manage (e.g. /store and frontend folders). The admin is stateless and reads/writes JSON wrapper files; use those to make pages and sections.
data.adminPrompt: When asked to create pages, add JSON wrapper files in /store with type "page", page, name, order, section, and data. Keep content data structured for the frontend. Do not change admin code or settings. The frontend should read /store JSONs as CMS content.
